profile.name: Okunade Sherif
profile.headline: I design and build scalable, high-performance systems with Node.js, TypeScript, React, and Next.js — from production APIs to full-stack products across fintech, legal tech, and more.
profile.aboutMeHeader: Backend & full-stack engineer building systems that scale.
profile.aboutMeContent:
Experienced Senior Software Engineer with a strong focus on backend and full-stack development. Skilled in designing and building scalable, high-performance systems using Node.js, TypeScript, Express, NestJS, React, and Next.js.

Proven experience delivering production-grade APIs, microservices, and data-intensive platforms across fintech, legal tech, logistics, and hospitality. Strong background in PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, caching strategies, and API design. Passionate about clean code, performance optimization, and building reliable systems that scale.
profile.siteDescription: Portfolio of Okunade Sherif — Senior Software Engineer specializing in backend and full-stack development.

heroBadges.text: Passionate about building products people love

experience.title: Software Engineer at Peerless Software
experience.description: Developed and maintained backend services for Sterling Bank's core banking platform (SEABAAS). Built secure REST APIs with Node.js, Express, and TypeScript, and designed PostgreSQL schemas for high-volume financial transactions. Implemented structured error handling, logging, and monitoring for mission-critical systems.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer at LawPavilion
experience.description: Architected scalable backend services for legal technology platforms. Designed RESTful and GraphQL APIs for document management, contract analysis, and AI-powered features. Optimized PostgreSQL and Redis caching, mentored junior engineers, and containerized services with Docker.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer at Innovacao
experience.description: Architected backend services for a food service and hotel management system using Node.js, Express, and NestJS. Built microservices for bookings, inventory, and orders, integrated Flutterwave and Paystack, and implemented real-time updates with WebSockets.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer at AccountableTechServe
experience.description: Built the core frontend of MONEHQ with Next.js and maintained Accountable's Express.js and GraphQL backend. Enhanced API integrations, resolved backend bottlenecks, and delivered new features in close collaboration with stakeholders.

experience.title: Frontend Engineer at Vatebra Ltd
experience.description: Collaborated on SaaS applications using agile methodology. Built views for .NET MVC applications, worked on role management, performance management, and task tracking systems, and led a team of interns on a Memo and Approval system.

experience.title: Volunteer Team Lead at RashDevs
experience.description: Led and mentored backend development teams on learning projects using Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL. Facilitated sessions on API design, database optimization, and deployment while guiding developers through code reviews and pair programming.
